title: hieracium ustulatum var. nigritellum
intro: Hieracium ustulatum var. nigritellum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium ustulatum var. nigritellum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and supporting digestive health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Hieracium ustulatum var. nigritellum is typically used as a tincture or infusion, although it can also be used in salves and ointments to support skin health.
